title: 金鯱賞の後に・足元から伸びる影

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether by the will of the gods or her own
efforts, Matikanefukukitaru claims victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After witnessing her behavior before the race,
Silence Suzuka is worried about
Matikanefukukitaru's preoccupation with luck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking in Silence Suzuka's concerns,
Matikanefukukitaru comes back to her senses.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing her overdependence on luck, she
freezes up, questioning whether any of her
victories are really her own.
